summary: Black-letter-commentary deliverable fixture validating output-mode composition for KR Article 33-2 article-by-article commentary.

issue_map.answer: Article 33-2 imposes mandatory disclosure with delegated implementing rules; sanction exposure is statutory.

key_findings: Article 33-2 of [src_001] is the controlling rule for probability disclosure of randomized paid items in Korea.

sources.title: Korean Game Industry Promotion Act probability disclosure provisions

claim_checks.claim: Article 33-2 imposes mandatory disclosure for randomized paid items.
claim_checks.limitation: Implementing rule depth still being clarified by MoCST.
